name: domains.xch

attributes.value: Chia Name Service (CNS) is a universal name service that seamlessly connects people, information, assets, and applications in the digital world. It is secured by the Chia blockchain and also designed to be chain-agnostic. The CNS is a decentralized, censorship-resistant, and open-source digital gateway to Web 3.0. The CNS domains can be traded like normal NFTs.

description: Chia Name Service (CNS) is a decentralized, censorship-resistant, and open-source digital gateway to Web 3.0.
